basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) Technician (CSSD) Notification 2026 has been released on 10 June 2026 on the official website of Tata Memorial Centre. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the TMC Technician (CSSD) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Technician (CSSD): H.Sc (Science) with 50% minimum marks. One year experience in C.S.S.D. of a Hospital preferred.

all_official_links.label: Download TMC Technician (CSSD) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this TMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this Tata Memorial Centre recruitment is Technician (CSSD).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Technician (CSSD) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies available for the Technician (CSSD) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 16th June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Technician (CSSD) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have H.Sc (Science) with a minimum of 50% marks. One year of experience in C.S.S.D. of a Hospital is preferred.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Technician (CSSD) post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Technician (CSSD) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 23,870 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Technician (CSSD) role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Skill Test, and Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview venue is in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, with pincode 221005. The exact address will be in the official notification.
